◎简　　介  

　　"Petal and Moth" is a film about human connection, both established and unexpected. In its center is Petal, a woman wounded by not so distant betrayal and loss. She has come to her cousin Hannah for healing - to a town with an unusual river, a place with an unusual person named David. To trust again is a challenge for Petal.
